# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.005 — Rulemaking Authority

The department may adopt rules necessary to carry out this chapter and the federal act and to maintain compliance with 49 C.F.R. Parts 383 and 384.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., 1st C.S., Ch. 4 (S.B.1), Sec. 72.12, eff. September 28, 2011.*
